message:
feat(extras): add export adapters (HTML, SVG, Text) for Buffer rendering

Feature-gated export module in ftui-extras with HtmlExporter, SvgExporter,
and TextExporter for rendering Buffer contents to various output formats.
Includes 32 tests and 1 doctest covering all exporters, styles, and edge
cases.

Closes bd-2fx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
